title: Lord Eagle Hand Mixer Electric Whisk, 400W Power Handheld Mixer for Baking Cake Egg Cream Food Beater, Turbo Boost/Self-Control Speed + 5 Speed + Eject Button + 5 Accessories, White
features: 🍰 5 SPEEDS WITH EJECTION BUTTON - This hand mixer with 1 to 5 different speeds. Whether it is slow, medium, or fast speeds to meet your mixing needs in all directions. NOTE: Need to adjust to "0" speed to eject.

🍰 400W POWERFUL MOTOR & FAST HEAT DISSIPATION - The Newest Upgrade All-Pure Copper Motor, Differ from Copper-Clad Aluminum in the market. The minimum speed is 300 w, The peak power turns to 400 w when you turn the button to 5 speed. Mix dough, eggs, milk, butter, cake, or even cream quickly, efficiently and easily.

🍰 TURBO BOOST/SELF-CONTROL SPEED, SUITABLE FOR BEGINNERS - Avoid ingredients splash, And can speed up each gear at the same time. When you can’t control the speed, Please turn off all speeds, and press the left control button. The ergonomic grip is comfortable and convenient to operate.

🍰 5 STAINLESS STEEL ACCESSORIES - Easy to clean and dishwasher safe. 2 × Dough Hooks for whipping dough, 2 × Beaters 1 × Whisk for eggs and creams, No rust and fall off will appear after long time use.

🍰 HIGH-LEVEL CUSTOMER SERVICE - Professional electric hand mixer is the best choice for gift giving. ONE-YEAR free warranty, and LIFE-TIME customer service. Note: If there is any part of the damaged attachment, please contact us to get a replacement.
